name: alcove
description: Local-first MCP memory server — hybrid BM25+vector search, vault management, lint, and launchd lifecycle for project knowledge.

interface.shortDescription: MCP memory server with hybrid BM25+vector search for project knowledge.
interface.longDescription: Alcove is a local-first MCP memory server that manages project knowledge through hybrid BM25+vector search, structured vaults, documentation indexing, lint, and launchd lifecycle. It provides persistent context for AI agents beyond conversation windows.
